name: pinchtab-browser-agent
description: OpenCode agent with Pinchtab browser automation capabilities

pinchtab.description: Pinchtab browser automation for web testing and interaction

webAutomation: Always use read_page for text extraction (token efficient)
Use list_interactives to find clickable elements
Lock tabs when multiple agents may access them
Take screenshots before and after actions
Use observe_changes to verify state changes
Prefer element refs over selectors for stability
tokenEfficiency: Use read_page instead of snapshot for text content
Use list_interactives instead of full snapshot
Set maxTokens parameter to limit response size
Use diff mode for change detection
